subtitle.ja: 中指の構えから始めます。両手小指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin in Middle Finger Base. Release the little-finger loops.

subtitle.ja: 片方の手の小指で、全ての糸の下を通して親指の手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With the little finger of one hand, pass under all the strings and pick up from below the near thumb string.

subtitle.ja: もう片方の小指で、反対側の小指の向こうの糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With the other little finger, pick up from below the far string of the opposite little finger.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指の糸を外します
両手親指で、中指の糸を越えて子指の手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the middle-finger strings and pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指の輪に親指を下から入れて広げます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the middle-finger loops and spread.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の、上の糸を残したまま親指同士を繋いでいる下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper thumb strings in place, release only the lower string that runs between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指を、親指の前にある三角の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both middle fingers down into the triangular loop in front of the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手の小指の糸を外します
左手をこちら側に、右手を向こう側に向けて広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Turn the left hand toward you and the right hand away, and spread to show the finished figure.
